# Mate

> Mate is a Go component framework for building terminal UIs on top of Bubble Tea. You compose a component tree and set callbacks — no custom Update() or View() needed. It provides focus management, keyboard and mouse event routing, global key bindings, layouts, and popup window support.

Mate uses Bubble Tea as its runtime but replaces the Elm Architecture pattern. Instead of writing Model/Update/View, you create components, add them to containers, and wire callbacks. The framework handles event routing, focus cycling, and rendering automatically.

Key bindings use simple strings: `RegisterKeyBinding("ctrl+q", "Quit", action)` and `BindDefaultActionToKey("ctrl+s", "Save")`.

Layouts: Vertical (stack top-to-bottom, no flex), Horizontal (stack left-to-right, no flex), TCB (Top-Center-Bottom, center stretches to fill remaining space). Only TCB stretches.

Packages: `widget/` (components, containers, layouts), `input/` (focus management), `window/` (windows, popups, Bubble Tea adapter).

## Docs

- [Getting Started](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/muralx/mate/main/docs/getting-started.md): Installation, core concepts, first application walkthrough
- [Components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/muralx/mate/main/docs/components.md): All widgets — Button, TextInput, Toggle, CheckboxList, TabComponent, Table, ScrollableText, Card, Text, Field, FormattedTextInput
- [Layout](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/muralx/mate/main/docs/layout.md): Panel layouts (Vertical, Horizontal, TCB), preferred sizes, common patterns
- [Focus and Keyboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/muralx/mate/main/docs/focus-and-keyboard.md): Focus cycling, key bindings, global shortcuts, event flow
- [Mouse](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/muralx/mate/main/docs/mouse.md): Hit testing, click-to-focus, mouse event handling
- [Windows and Popups](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/muralx/mate/main/docs/windows-and-popups.md): MainWindow, PopupWindow, App, popup lifecycle
- [Styling](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/muralx/mate/main/docs/styling.md): Lip Gloss integration, style structs, BorderConfig, themes
- [API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/muralx/mate/main/docs/api-reference.md): Complete type and method reference

## Examples

- [Tab Demo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/muralx/mate/main/tabdemo/main.go): Nested tabs, cards, text inputs, keyboard shortcuts
- [UI Demo - Main Window](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/muralx/mate/main/uidemo/main_window.go): Full app with dashboard, server management, settings tabs
- [UI Demo - Popups](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/muralx/mate/main/uidemo/popups.go): Confirm dialog and form popup patterns
- [UI Demo - Theme](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/muralx/mate/main/uidemo/theme.go): Custom theme with color palette and style functions

## Optional

- [Integration Tests](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/muralx/mate/main/widget/fullflow_test.go): Full component tree test patterns
